_comment: Performance baselines for the perf-regression gate in .github/workflows/perf.yml. Each key is `<bench_name>_<unit>`; the value is the median from a measurement run. The CI gate fails if any tracked bench regresses >10% vs these numbers. merge_10kb_clean_us was re-baselined from GHA ubuntu-latest (was 18us from a local M6.8 run — too tight for shared CI runners). To update after an intentional perf change: run `cargo bench --bench <name>`, paste the new median here, and document the change in the PR description.
